_meta.provenance: Approval catalogue: what government must approve before each module can be built or piloted. All entries are Proposed requirements identified from the module designs — none have been formally initiated. Timelines are deliberately absent (no dates invented). Modules not listed have not been authored yet.

approvals.name: Platform hosting procurement (MeitY-empanelled cloud)
approvals.purpose: Host the platform on GI-Cloud-compliant, India-resident infrastructure.
approvals.output: Hosting contract with an empanelled CSP
approvals.riskIfDelayed: No production environment; pilots limited to demonstrations.

approvals.name: DPDP compliance review (platform-wide)
approvals.purpose: Confirm consent architecture — especially Section 9 verifiable guardian consent for minors — before any personal data is processed.
prerequisites: Data-classification of every dataset in the catalogue
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Blocks every module that touches personal data — effectively all pilots.

approvals.name: Release of SAI organisation structure & sanctioned posts
approvals.purpose: Seed the directory with the official hierarchy and post list (Immediate Move #1).
prerequisites: Formal request letter from the project owner
approvals.output: Official org chart, sanctioned-post list, nodal officers
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Directory built from public fragments — unofficial and unmaintainable.

approvals.name: Publication policy for roles and contacts
approvals.purpose: Decide what is public (roles, jurisdictions) vs restricted (personal contact details of officers).
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Either an unusable directory (nothing public) or a privacy incident.

approvals.name: State consent to list department structures
approvals.purpose: States own their structures; listing needs their consent and a named maintainer.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Directory covers central bodies only — routing fails for state/district work.

approvals.name: Approval to mirror the recognition register
approvals.purpose: Make the platform's federation status view authoritative by mirroring the statutory register.
approvals.output: Data-sharing arrangement for recognition orders and status
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Platform shows stale or unofficial recognition status — worse than nothing for courts and athletes.

approvals.name: Federation consent for compliance scorecards
approvals.purpose: Publish election, filing and safe-sport compliance as public traffic-lights.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Scorecards contested by federations; legal challenges under the Act.

approvals.name: Tribunal-outcome publication scope
approvals.purpose: Define which tribunal outcomes (affecting recognition/office bearers) appear on the registry.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Registry silently diverges from legal reality after disputes.

approvals.name: Scheme-integration approval (per scheme, starting Khelo India scholarships)
approvals.purpose: Run application intake, eligibility and tracking for a scheme on the platform.
prerequisites: Scheme rules encoded as structured eligibility criteria
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Eligibility engine has nothing to run on; M3 reduces to a links page.

approvals.name: PFMS data access for sports schemes
approvals.entity: Office of the CGA, Ministry of Finance
approvals.purpose: Read sanction/release/utilisation stages for sports scheme payments.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Fund tracking limited to manual updates — the transparency promise weakens.

approvals.name: eOffice file-status integration
approvals.purpose: Mirror desk-level file status for scheme files.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: “Where is my file” stays unanswerable; delay analytics impossible.

approvals.name: DigiLocker partner onboarding
approvals.purpose: Pull applicant documents with consent (requester); later issue certificates (issuer).
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Applicants keep uploading photocopies; document fraud risk persists.

approvals.name: CPGRAMS interoperability decision
approvals.purpose: Agree the model: domain front-end with cross-references, or full residence in CPGRAMS with category feeds.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: A duplicate national grievance channel — confusing for citizens, unacceptable to DARPG.

approvals.name: SLA and escalation-matrix adoption
approvals.purpose: Give the SLA clock and auto-escalation legal footing — states cannot be centrally mandated.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Escalations have no authority; SLA breaches carry no consequence.

approvals.name: Bulk-messaging channel registration
approvals.entity: Telecom DLT registration via chosen provider; platform consent design per DPDP
approvals.purpose: Send targeted SMS/notifications lawfully (sender registration, template approval, consent records).
approvals.output: Registered sender IDs and approved templates
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Targeted messaging — the module's reach promise — cannot launch.

approvals.name: School-time screening approval
approvals.entity: State education departments / boards (with MoE guidance)
approvals.purpose: Permit screening games inside the school calendar and instruct schools to participate.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: No lawful access to the school day — the module's entire delivery channel.

approvals.name: Verifiable guardian-consent mechanism sign-off
approvals.purpose: Approve the specific mechanism for verifiable parent/guardian consent before capturing any minor's screening data.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Blocks every school pilot — this is the platform's hardest legal gate.

approvals.name: Screening-protocol alignment with Fit India GOALS
approvals.purpose: One national test battery: the screening games extend the existing GOALS protocols instead of competing with them.
prerequisites: Draft battery mapped test-by-test to GOALS
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Two rival test batteries in schools — confusion and double burden on PT teachers.

approvals.name: UDISE+ / APAAR data-linkage approval
approvals.purpose: Use UDISE+ school codes as the registry key and link APAAR IDs with guardian consent.
prerequisites: Data-minimisation spec (what is read, what is never read)
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Screening records fragment across schools; transfers break history.

approvals.name: Teacher scout-duty permission (service rules)
approvals.entity: State education departments (teachers are a state subject)
approvals.purpose: Permit government PT teachers to hold scout roles and log discovery activity.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Teachers participate informally with no protection or recognition — the programme stays invisible.

approvals.name: Scout recognition & reward policy
approvals.entity: MYAS (financial approval required for any monetary element)
approvals.purpose: Approve the recognition ladder: certificates, national events, career credit — and decide whether any monetary reward exists.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: The incentive engine of the discovery pillar never starts.

approvals.name: Scout training accreditation
approvals.purpose: Accredit the short scout-training curriculum so certified scouts have a recognised credential.
prerequisites: Curriculum draft aligned with screening protocol
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Scouts screen without standardised training — data quality suffers at the source.

approvals.name: NSRS integration & identity-service approval
approvals.purpose: The platform's most important approval: programmatic identity lookup/create against NSRS and the right to attach records to the Khelo India ID.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Every identity-dependent module (M5, M7, M8, M14–M16, M18) runs on a manual bridge — the 'one identity' promise weakens to a slogan.

approvals.name: AI talent-score governance policy
approvals.entity: MYAS (AI governance board to be constituted)
approvals.purpose: Approve the advisory-only AI policy: scores never auto-decide, explainability required, bias audit scheduled, athlete appeal path defined.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Either no AI (module reduces to a timeline) or ungoverned AI (selection scandals waiting to happen).

approvals.name: NADA doping-flag arrangement
approvals.purpose: Share eligibility flags (sanctioned / eligible, with window) — never test data — for selection-facing views.
prerequisites: Legal review of WADA data rules
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Selectors keep learning about sanctions from the press; an ineligible selection embarrasses everyone.

approvals.name: Result-verification precedence rules
approvals.entity: NSFs + state associations, ratified by NSB
approvals.purpose: Adopt the documented precedence order for conflicting results (answers Q5) so the timeline can mark records 'verified'.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: 'Verified' badge means nothing; disputes land on the platform with no rulebook.

approvals.name: Event-sanctioning protocol adoption
approvals.entity: NSFs / NSB; School Games Federation and university boards for their events
approvals.purpose: Only sanctioned events feed verified results — the protocol defines who may sanction what.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Unsanctioned results pollute the Athlete 360 timeline; age-fraud risk rises.

approvals.name: GMS coordination agreement
approvals.purpose: Define the boundary: GMS runs Khelo India Games; M8 covers the long tail (school, district, federation events) and both share one calendar and results standard.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Two games platforms with incompatible results — the exact fragmentation this platform exists to end.

approvals.name: DigiLocker issuer onboarding (certificates)
approvals.purpose: Issue participation and medal certificates directly to athletes' DigiLocker accounts.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Certificates stay forgeable paper; M3 and M16 must keep verifying manually.

approvals.name: NSRS coach-registry integration
approvals.purpose: Extend NSRS coach/support-personnel records with qualifications, deployments and panels under shared identity.
prerequisites: A-M7-1 scoped to include coach records
approvals.riskIfDelayed: A second coach database appears — the exact duplication the platform exists to end.

approvals.name: Qualification-verification protocol
approvals.entity: SAI academic division (NIS Patiala) with LNIPE/NSU
approvals.purpose: Agree how coaching diplomas/degrees are verified — DigiLocker issuance preferred, registry lookup as fallback.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: 'Verified coach' badge is unverifiable — credential fraud persists.

approvals.name: Safe-sport vetting standard for minor-facing roles
approvals.entity: MYAS legal with state police-verification authorities
approvals.purpose: Define the background-check standard for coaches/scouts working with minors, and who runs it.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: A safeguarding incident involving an unvetted listed coach is an existential platform risk.

approvals.name: GatiShakti sports-layer engagement
approvals.purpose: Agree whether the facility registry publishes as a layer on the NMP platform, and who maintains it.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Sports infra stays invisible to national planning; the platform runs its own map only.

approvals.name: Facility-data release (SAI + states)
approvals.entity: SAI infrastructure division; each state department
approvals.purpose: Release facility inventories with location, condition and custodianship.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Map launches empty or crowdsourced-only — trust never establishes.

approvals.name: Public booking & access policy
approvals.entity: MYAS with states and local bodies
approvals.purpose: Decide which government facilities are publicly bookable, fee handling, and priority rules (athletes vs public).
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Utilisation tracking without booking becomes surveillance without service.

approvals.name: Asset-register adoption order (QR tagging)
approvals.purpose: Mandate QR tagging and scan-based custody for new purchases and phased legacy enumeration.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Register covers a shrinking island of tagged assets; leakage continues untracked.

approvals.name: GeM purchase-feed linkage
approvals.purpose: Receive order metadata for sports-department purchases so assets register at procurement.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Every new asset needs manual entry — adoption dies at the data-entry desk.

approvals.name: Condemnation & write-off workflow alignment
approvals.purpose: Align the register's disposal workflow with General Financial Rules stock-verification and write-off norms.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Digital register diverges from audit reality; officials keep parallel paper stock books.

approvals.name: National accreditation standard adoption
approvals.purpose: One standard extending the existing Khelo India academy accreditation — criteria, scoring, validity, appeals.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Competing quality labels confuse parents — the market failure M12 exists to fix.

approvals.name: Inspection protocol & inspector authorisation
approvals.entity: State departments (DSO inspectors); SAI for national-level academies
approvals.purpose: Authorise who inspects academies, on what checklist, with what evidence standard.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Accreditation becomes self-declared — the badge means nothing.

approvals.name: Marketplace listing & review policy
approvals.purpose: Listing eligibility (accredited-only?), ranking neutrality, review moderation and academy grievance path.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Legal exposure from rankings; review manipulation poisons trust.

approvals.name: Sports-science protocol standardisation
approvals.entity: SAI sports-science division with National Sports University
approvals.purpose: Standard assessment batteries, injury classifications and return-to-play protocols across the network.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Data from different centres cannot be compared; the 'network' is a label.

approvals.name: ABDM linkage & health-data consent architecture
approvals.entity: National Health Authority with MYAS legal
approvals.purpose: Athlete injury/treatment records ride ABDM consent rails (ABHA-linked) rather than a parallel medical store; settle fiduciary roles.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Platform becomes an unlicensed medical-records silo — the highest-risk data on the platform.

approvals.name: Injury-care provider empanelment
approvals.purpose: Empanel hospitals/clinics for athlete injury care with agreed tariffs and data obligations.
approvals.riskIfDelayed: Injured grassroots athletes keep falling out of sport for lack of a care pathway.
